name: Muhammad Ali Abid
bio: AI researcher and data scientist turning uncertain language, noisy data, and autonomous workflows into systems that can reason, explain, and withstand real use.

cards.label: Creative Blend
cards.value: AI systems, product UI, and data storytelling

cards.label: Working Style
cards.value: Quiet research, sharp demos, measured execution

signal.status: Available for ambitious AI, analytics, and product work
signal.tone: Clear brief, purposeful build, polished handoff

projects.title: Robust NLP Classifier App
projects.description: A disciplined text-intelligence pipeline that turns raw language into defensible predictions through preprocessing, feature engineering, model inference, and a clear demo surface.

projects.title: Noor-e-Hidayat
projects.description: A digital sanctuary for Islamic knowledge, designed around reverence, clarity, and practical access without letting ornament overpower purpose.

projects.title: Al-Minbar Islamic Super App
projects.description: Quran, Hadith, masjid discovery, and faith-centered utilities shaped into a coherent product experience for daily guidance.

projects.title: Trade Intelligence Portal
projects.description: A national-scale intelligence surface that turns trade records into navigable economic evidence for analysts and decision-makers.

projects.title: ModivCare Trip Tracker Pro
projects.description: An operational tracker for non-emergency medical transportation, built to make logistics, accountability, and service continuity easier to inspect.

projects.title: Stock Forecaster
projects.description: A forecasting study that treats markets as noisy language: volatile, patterned, and best understood through careful signals rather than certainty theater.

projects.title: Al-Burhan Portal
projects.description: A collaborative education portal shaped around proof, structure, and learning paths that make knowledge easier to approach and retain.

projects.title: Layer Forge AI
projects.description: An AI infrastructure concept for assembling intelligent layers into deployable agentic products with sharper orchestration boundaries.

projects.title: Data Viz Histogram Tool
projects.description: A visualization utility that reveals the hidden shape of uploaded data, whether numerical or categorical, without burying the user in ceremony.

timeline.title: Business Data Analytics foundation
timeline.text: Built the base for decision intelligence: data-backed reporting, analytical framing, business context, dashboards, and evidence-first communication.

timeline.title: Applied AI and product missions
timeline.text: Converted research ideas into usable prototypes: NLP classifiers, AI-assisted workflows, product surfaces, and demos shaped around real user constraints.

timeline.title: Engineering craft learned in the field
timeline.text: Practiced Python, TypeScript, evaluation, UI systems, deployment discipline, and the habit of making hidden system behavior readable.

timeline.title: Current direction
timeline.text: Focused on agentic AI, LLM/NLP systems, dashboards, and full-stack tools that combine atmosphere with dependable utility.
